#!/bin/bash
# Ralph Loop - Main loop script with output formatting
# Runs inside the Docker container

set -euo pipefail

# Track start time for session duration
SESSION_START=$(date +%s)

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary() {
    local exit_reason="${1:-completed}"
    local session_end=$(date +%s)
    local duration=$((session_end - SESSION_START))
    local duration_mins=$((duration / 60))
    local duration_secs=$((duration % 60))

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    if [ "$exit_reason" = "interrupted" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Ralph Session Interrupted${NC}"
    elif [ "$exit_reason" = "error" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}Ralph Session Ended (Error)${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}Ralph Session Complete${NC}"
    fi
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo ""

    # Session stats
    echo "  Session Details:"
    echo "    Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
    echo "    Iterations: $ITERATION"
    echo "    Duration: ${duration_mins}m ${duration_secs}s"
    echo "    Mode: $MODE"
    echo ""

    # Git summary
    local commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "  Work Completed:"
        echo "    Commits: $commit_count"

        # Show files changed
        local files_changed=$(git diff --name-only "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$files_changed" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "    Files modified: $files_changed"

            # Show top 5 most changed files
            echo ""
            echo "    Key changes:"
            git diff --stat "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -6 | tail -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
        fi

        echo ""
        echo "    Recent commits:"
        git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    else
        echo "  No commits made during this session"
    fi

    # Implementation plan summary if exists
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        local completed_count=$(grep -c "^## Completed" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        local current_count=$(grep -c "^## Current Focus" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$completed_count" -gt 0 ] || [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            echo "  Plan Status:"
            echo "    See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for details"
        fi
    fi

    # Next steps
    echo ""
    echo "  Next Steps:"
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "    1. Review changes: git diff ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}...${RALPH_BRANCH}"
        echo "    2. Test the changes in your environment"
        echo "    3. Create PR: gh pr create --base ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH} --head ${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    else
        echo "    1. Review any analysis or plans created"
        echo "    2. Consider running: ./ralph.sh build"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
}

# Open a PR and immediately merge it into the base branch
auto_merge_pr() {
    local commit_count
    commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No commits on $RALPH_BRANCH — skipping PR"
        return 0
    fi

    command -v gh &>/dev/null || { log_warn "gh CLI not found — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
    [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || { log_warn "GITHUB_TOKEN not set — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }

    local title
    title="ralph: $(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)"
    local body
    body="$(printf 'Auto-merged by Ralph (%d iteration(s))\n\n' "$ITERATION")$(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH")"

    log_info "Creating PR: $RALPH_BRANCH -> $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    local pr_url
    if pr_url=$(gh pr create --base "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --head "$RALPH_BRANCH" --title "$title" --body "$body" 2>&1); then
        log_success "PR created: $pr_url"
        if gh pr merge "$pr_url" --merge --delete-branch 2>&1; then
            log_success "PR merged into $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
        else
            log_warn "Auto-merge failed — review manually: $pr_url"
        fi
    else
        log_warn "PR creation failed: $pr_url"
    fi
}

# Cleanup scaffolding files
cleanup_scaffolding() {
    log_info "Cleaning up Ralph scaffolding files..."

    local files_to_remove=()
    local dirs_to_remove=()

    # Check which scaffolding files exist
    [ -d "specs" ] && dirs_to_remove+=("specs")
    [ -f "AGENTS.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("AGENTS.md")
    [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan_local.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build_local.md")

    if [ ${#files_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ] && [ ${#dirs_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No scaffolding files to clean up"
        return
    fi

    # Remove the files
    for file in "${files_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || rm -f "$file"
        log_info "  Removed: $file"
    done

    for dir in "${dirs_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -rf "$dir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$dir"
        log_info "  Removed: $dir/"
    done

    # Create cleanup commit if there are changes
    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_info "Creating cleanup commit..."
        git commit -m "chore: Remove Ralph scaffolding files

These files were used during the Ralph development session
and are no longer needed for the final pull request."

        # Push if enabled
        if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing cleanup commit..."
            git push origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                git push -u origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
        fi
    fi
}

# Handle interruption gracefully
handle_interruption() {
    echo ""
    log_warn "Ralph loop interrupted by user (Ctrl+C)"
    generate_work_summary "interrupted"
    /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "interrupted" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
    exit 130
}

# Set up signal trap for graceful interruption
trap 'handle_interruption' INT TERM

# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
entire_available() {
    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
}

# Change to workspace directory
cd "${RALPH_WORKSPACE:-/home/ralph/workspace}"

# Configuration from environment
MODE="${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
MAX_ITERATIONS="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0}"
MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
OUTPUT_FORMAT="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-plain}"
PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"

# Determine prompt file
case "$MODE" in
    plan)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_plan.md"
        ;;
    build|*)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_build.md"
        ;;
esac

# Check if using local model (Ollama) - prefer _local variants
IS_LOCAL_MODEL=false
if [[ "$MODEL" == ollama/* ]] || [[ -n "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" && "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" != *"anthropic.com"* ]]; then
    IS_LOCAL_MODEL=true
fi

# Check for project-specific prompts (prefer _local for local models)
if [ "$IS_LOCAL_MODEL" = true ] && [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md"
    log_info "Using local model prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
elif [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}.md"
    log_info "Using project prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
fi

# Verify prompt exists
if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

# Read prompt content now (before any git operations that might stash/remove files)
PROMPT_CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")

# Build model argument
MODEL_ARG="--model $MODEL"

# Iteration counter
ITERATION=0

# Verify we're in a git repo
if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Not a git repository!"
    log_error "Initialize with: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
    exit 1
fi

# Get the workspace name from directory
WORKSPACE_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")

# Create a new branch for this Ralph session
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
RALPH_BRANCH="ralph/${WORKSPACE_NAME}-${TIMESTAMP}"
ORIGINAL_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")

# Guard: if we're on a stale ralph branch, switch to main before proceeding
if [[ "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" == ralph/* ]]; then
    log_warn "Currently on stale ralph branch: $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    log_info "Switching to main before starting new session..."
    DEFAULT_BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
    if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_warn "Committing uncommitted changes before switching branches..."
        git add -A && git commit -m "wip: uncommitted changes from previous session" 2>/dev/null || true
        git push origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    if git checkout "$DEFAULT_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
        ORIGINAL_BRANCH="$DEFAULT_BRANCH"
        log_info "Switched to $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    else
        log_error "Failed to switch to $DEFAULT_BRANCH — run: git checkout main && git pull"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

# Warn if main is behind origin so we don't silently work on stale code
if git fetch origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --dry-run 2>/dev/null; then
    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse "origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then
        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then
            log_warn "Branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH — consider running: git pull"
        fi
    fi
fi

# Check for uncommitted changes
DID_STASH=false
if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then
    log_warn "Uncommitted changes detected"
    log_info "Stashing changes before creating branch..."
    git stash push -m "Ralph auto-stash before $RALPH_BRANCH"
    DID_STASH=true
fi

# Create and checkout the new branch
log_info "Creating branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
if ! git checkout -b "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Failed to create branch $RALPH_BRANCH"
    exit 1
fi

# Restore stashed changes onto the new branch so scaffolding files are available
if [ "$DID_STASH" = true ]; then
    log_info "Restoring stashed changes onto $RALPH_BRANCH..."
    git stash pop 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Stash pop failed (changes may conflict)"
fi

log_info "Starting loop..."
log_info "Prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
log_info "Model: $MODEL"
log_info "Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH (from $ORIGINAL_BRANCH)"
log_info "Working dir: $(pwd)"

# Check for IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
    log_info "Found IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md - will continue from existing progress"
else
    log_warn "No IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md found - Ralph will create one"
fi
echo ""

# Temp file for capturing output
OUTPUT_TMP=$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "$OUTPUT_TMP"' EXIT

# Output formatting command
format_output() {
    if [ "$OUTPUT_FORMAT" = "pretty" ]; then
        /home/ralph/scripts/format-output.sh
    else
        cat
    fi
}

# Check for critical errors in output
# Only check the result JSON line, not the full conversation
check_for_errors() {
    local output_file="$1"

    # Extract just the final result line (contains "type":"result")
    local result_line
    result_line=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)

    # If no result line, check for startup errors in full output
    if [[ -z "$result_line" ]]; then
        # Check for model not found during startup (LiteLLM specific error)
        if grep -q "OllamaException.*not found\|litellm.*model.*not found" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Model not found: $MODEL"
            echo ""
            log_error "Available models - check litellm-config.yaml or run: ollama list"
            return 1
        fi

        # Check for connection errors
        if grep -q "APIConnectionError\|Connection refused\|ECONNREFUSED" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Connection error - is Ollama running?"
            return 1
        fi
    fi

    # Check result line for errors
    if [[ -n "$result_line" ]]; then
        if echo "$result_line" | grep -q '"is_error":true'; then
            # Extract error message if present
            local errors
            errors=$(echo "$result_line" | grep -o '"errors":\[[^]]*\]' | head -1)
            if [[ -n "$errors" ]]; then
                log_warn "Session completed with errors"
                # Don't fail - Ralph might have partially succeeded
            fi
        fi
    fi

    return 0
}

# Main loop
log_info "Max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS (ITERATION starts at $ITERATION)"
while true; do
    # Check iteration limit
    if [ "$MAX_ITERATIONS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ITERATION" -ge "$MAX_ITERATIONS" ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        break
    fi

    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
    echo ""
    echo "┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐"
    echo "│  ITERATION $ITERATION                                  │"
    echo "└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘"
    echo ""

    # Run Claude with the prompt, capture output for error checking
    # -p: Headless mode (non-interactive)
    # --dangerously-skip-permissions: Auto-approve tool calls
    # --output-format=stream-json: Structured output for filtering
    echo "$PROMPT_CONTENT" | claude -p \
        --dangerously-skip-permissions \
        --output-format=stream-json \
        $MODEL_ARG \
        --verbose 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_TMP" | format_output

    CLAUDE_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

    # Check for critical errors
    if ! check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_TMP"; then
        log_error "Critical error detected, stopping loop"
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        echo "  Raw error output:"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        # Show last 50 lines of raw output for debugging
        tail -50 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
        generate_work_summary "error"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
        log_warn "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
        # Show some context on non-zero exit
        echo "Last output:"
        tail -20 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
    fi

    # Push changes if configured
    if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
        if [ -n "$CURRENT_BRANCH" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing to origin/$CURRENT_BRANCH..."
            push_output=""
            if push_output=$(git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful"
            elif push_output=$(git push -u origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful (set upstream)"
            else
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
                # Check for common SSH issues
                if echo "$push_output" | grep -q "authenticity of host\|Host key verification"; then
                    log_warn "SSH host key not trusted. Run on host machine:"
                    log_warn "  ssh-keyscan <git-host> >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts"
                elif echo "$push_output" | grep -q "Permission denied\|publickey"; then
                    log_warn "SSH key issue. Ensure ~/.ssh is mounted and keys have correct permissions"
                else
                    echo "$push_output" | head -5
                fi
            fi
        fi
    else
        log_info "Push disabled (RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=false)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    log_success "ITERATION $ITERATION COMPLETE"
    if entire_available; then
        checkpoint_info=$(entire status --short 2>/dev/null) && \
            log_info "Entire: $checkpoint_info" || true
    fi
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    echo ""

    # Check if all tasks in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md are complete
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        pending_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[ \]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        completed_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[x\]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$pending_tasks" -eq 0 ] && [ "$completed_tasks" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            log_success "All tasks complete ($completed_tasks done, 0 pending) — stopping early"
            break
        else
            log_info "Plan status: $completed_tasks done, $pending_tasks pending"
        fi
    fi

    # Small delay between iterations
    sleep 1
done

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary "completed"

# Clean up scaffolding files if configured
if [ "${RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING:-true}" = "true" ]; then
    cleanup_scaffolding
else
    log_info "Scaffolding cleanup disabled (RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING=false)"
fi

auto_merge_pr

/home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "completed" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"

echo ""
log_success "Loop finished after $ITERATION iterations"

#!/bin/bash
# Send a post-session summary email via SMTP_USER credentials.
# Called by loop.sh at the end of each session (normal or interrupted).
# Args: exit_reason branch original_branch iterations duration_secs
# No-ops silently if SMTP vars are unset.

EXIT_REASON="${1:-completed}"
BRANCH="${2:-unknown}"
ORIGINAL_BRANCH="${3:-main}"
ITERATIONS="${4:-0}"
DURATION_SECS="${5:-0}"

[ -z "${SMTP_HOST:-}" ] && exit 0
[ -z "${SMTP_USER:-}" ] && exit 0
[ -z "${SMTP_PASS:-}" ] && exit 0

MINS=$(( DURATION_SECS / 60 ))
SECS=$(( DURATION_SECS % 60 ))
COMMIT_COUNT=$(git rev-list --count "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
SUBJECT="[ralph] ${EXIT_REASON}: ${BRANCH} (${COMMIT_COUNT} commits, ${MINS}m ${SECS}s)"

BODY="Branch:     ${BRANCH}
Mode:       ${RALPH_MODE:-build}
Iterations: ${ITERATIONS}
Duration:   ${MINS}m ${SECS}s
Commits:    ${COMMIT_COUNT}
"

RECENT_COMMITS=$(git log "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" --oneline 2>/dev/null | head -10)
if [ -n "$RECENT_COMMITS" ]; then
    BODY+="
Commits:
${RECENT_COMMITS}
"
fi

DIFF_STAT=$(git diff --stat "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" 2>/dev/null | tail -5)
if [ -n "$DIFF_STAT" ]; then
    BODY+="
${DIFF_STAT}
"
fi

if [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && git log entire/checkpoints/v1 --oneline -1 &>/dev/null; then
    BODY+="
---
Entire Decision Log

$(git log entire/checkpoints/v1 --oneline -20 2>/dev/null)

Latest checkpoint:
$(git show entire/checkpoints/v1 --stat 2>/dev/null | head -20)"
fi

{
    printf "From: Ralph <${SMTP_USER}>\r\n"
    printf "To: ${SMTP_USER}\r\n"
    printf "Subject: ${SUBJECT}\r\n"
    printf "\r\n"
    printf "%s\n" "$BODY"
} | curl --silent \
    --url "smtps://${SMTP_HOST}:${SMTP_PORT:-465}" \
    --ssl-reqd \
    --mail-from "${SMTP_USER}" \
    --mail-rcpt "${SMTP_USER}" \
    --user "${SMTP_USER}:${SMTP_PASS}" \
    --upload-file - 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "[ralph] Notification sent to ${SMTP_USER}" \
    || echo "[ralph] Notification failed (continuing)"

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Ralph Setup - Interactive workspace setup with Claude generation
     3→# Runs inside the Docker container to prepare any repo for the Ralph loop
     4→
     5→set -euo pipefail
     6→
     7→# Graceful exit on Ctrl+C
     8→trap 'echo "" && echo -e "\033[0;36m[ralph]\033[0m Setup cancelled." && exit 0' INT
     9→
    10→# Colors
    11→RED='\033[0;31m'
    12→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    13→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    14→CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    15→BOLD='\033[1m'
    16→NC='\033[0m'
    17→
    18→log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    19→log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    20→log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    21→log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    22→
    23→MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
    24→
    25→# ─── Parse arguments ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    26→
    27→PROMPT_TEXT=""
    28→PROMPT_FILE=""
    29→
    30→while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    31→    case "$1" in
    32→        --prompt)
    33→            PROMPT_TEXT="$2"
    34→            shift 2
    35→            ;;
    36→        --prompt-file)
    37→            PROMPT_FILE="$2"
    38→            shift 2
    39→            ;;
    40→        *)
    41→            shift
    42→            ;;
    43→    esac
    44→done
    45→
    46→# ─── Verify workspace ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    47→
    48→if [ ! -d "/home/ralph/workspace" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A /home/ralph/workspace 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    49→    log_error "Workspace is empty. Mount your project:"
    50→    log_error "  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup"
    51→    exit 1
    52→fi
    53→
    54→cd /home/ralph/workspace
    55→
    56→if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
    57→    log_error "Not a git repository. Initialize first:"
    58→    log_error "  cd your-project && git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
    59→    exit 1
    60→fi
    61→
    62→# Resolve prompt from file if specified (after cd so paths resolve relative to workspace)
    63→if [ -n "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    64→    if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    65→        log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    66→        log_error "The path must be relative to your workspace (the WORKSPACE_PATH directory)."
    67→        log_error "Example: --prompt-file specs/prompt.md"
    68→        exit 1
    69→    fi
    70→    PROMPT_TEXT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")
    71→fi
    72→
    73→# ─── Check for existing Ralph files ─────────────────────────────────
    74→
    75→EXISTING_FILES=()
    76→for f in AGENTS.md IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md PROMPT_plan.md PROMPT_build.md ralph.sh; do
    77→    [ -f "$f" ] && EXISTING_FILES+=("$f")
    78→done
    79→[ -d "specs" ] && EXISTING_FILES+=("specs/")
    80→
    81→if [ ${#EXISTING_FILES[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    82→    if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
    83→        # When a prompt is provided, auto-overwrite without confirmation
    84→        log_info "Overwriting existing Ralph files: ${EXISTING_FILES[*]}"
    85→    else
    86→        echo ""
    87→        log_warn "Found existing Ralph files: ${EXISTING_FILES[*]}"
    88→        echo ""
    89→        read -p "Overwrite them? [y/N] " -r overwrite
    90→        if [[ ! "$overwrite" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
    91→            log_info "Setup cancelled. Existing files preserved."
    92→            exit 0
    93→        fi
    94→        echo ""
    95→    fi
    96→fi
    97→
    98→# ─── Interview ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    99→
   100→if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
   101→    # Prompt provided via --prompt or --prompt-file — skip interactive interview
   102→    log_info "Using provided prompt (${#PROMPT_TEXT} chars)"
   103→    PROJECT_GOAL="(see detailed prompt below)"
   104→    TECH_STACK=""
   105→    BUILD_CMD=""
   106→    TEST_CMD=""
   107→else
   108→    echo ""

#!/bin/bash
# Ralph Setup - Interactive workspace setup with Claude generation
# Runs inside the Docker container to prepare any repo for the Ralph loop

set -euo pipefail

# Graceful exit on Ctrl+C
trap 'echo "" && echo -e "\033[0;36m[ralph]\033[0m Setup cancelled." && exit 0' INT

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
BOLD='\033[1m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }

MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"

# ─── Parse arguments ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

PROMPT_TEXT=""
PROMPT_FILE=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --prompt)
            PROMPT_TEXT="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        --prompt-file)
            PROMPT_FILE="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        *)
            shift
            ;;
    esac
done

# ─── Verify workspace ────────────────────────────────────────────────

if [ ! -d "/home/ralph/workspace" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A /home/ralph/workspace 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    log_error "Workspace is empty. Mount your project:"
    log_error "  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup"
    exit 1
fi

cd /home/ralph/workspace

if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Not a git repository. Initialize first:"
    log_error "  cd your-project && git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
    exit 1
fi

# Resolve prompt from file if specified (after cd so paths resolve relative to workspace)
if [ -n "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
        log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
        log_error "The path must be relative to your workspace (the WORKSPACE_PATH directory)."
        log_error "Example: --prompt-file specs/prompt.md"
        exit 1
    fi
    PROMPT_TEXT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")
fi

# ─── Check for existing Ralph files ─────────────────────────────────

EXISTING_FILES=()
for f in AGENTS.md IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md PROMPT_plan.md PROMPT_build.md ralph.sh; do
    [ -f "$f" ] && EXISTING_FILES+=("$f")
done
[ -d "specs" ] && EXISTING_FILES+=("specs/")

if [ ${#EXISTING_FILES[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
        # When a prompt is provided, auto-overwrite without confirmation
        log_info "Overwriting existing Ralph files: ${EXISTING_FILES[*]}"
    else
        echo ""
        log_warn "Found existing Ralph files: ${EXISTING_FILES[*]}"
        echo ""
        read -p "Overwrite them? [y/N] " -r overwrite
        if [[ ! "$overwrite" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
            log_info "Setup cancelled. Existing files preserved."
            exit 0
        fi
        echo ""
    fi
fi

# ─── Interview ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
    # Prompt provided via --prompt or --prompt-file — skip interactive interview
    log_info "Using provided prompt (${#PROMPT_TEXT} chars)"
    PROJECT_GOAL="(see detailed prompt below)"
    TECH_STACK=""
    BUILD_CMD=""
    TEST_CMD=""
else
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
    echo -e "${BOLD}  Ralph Setup${NC}"
    echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo -e "  Answer 4 questions to configure Ralph for your project."
    echo -e "  Type ${BOLD}quit${NC} or press ${BOLD}Ctrl+C${NC} at any prompt to exit."
    echo ""
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}Prefer to skip the interview?${NC} Pass your project"
    echo -e "  description directly and setup runs fully automated:"
    echo ""
    echo -e "    ${BOLD}--prompt \"Build a REST API with auth and PostgreSQL\"${NC}"
    echo -e "    ${BOLD}--prompt-file specs/prompt.md${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}Example:${NC}"
    echo -e "    WORKSPACE_PATH=. docker compose run --rm ralph setup \\"
    echo -e "      --prompt \"Your project description here\""
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
    echo ""

    # 1. Project goal (required)
    PROJECT_GOAL=""
    while [ -z "$PROJECT_GOAL" ]; do
        read -p "In one sentence, what is the goal of this project? " -r PROJECT_GOAL
        if [[ "$PROJECT_GOAL" =~ ^(quit|exit|q)$ ]]; then
            log_info "Setup cancelled."
            exit 0
        fi
        if [ -z "$PROJECT_GOAL" ]; then
            log_warn "Project goal is required."
        fi
    done

    # 2. Tech stack (optional)
    echo ""
    read -p "What tech stack? (press Enter to auto-detect from codebase) " -r TECH_STACK
    if [[ "$TECH_STACK" =~ ^(quit|exit|q)$ ]]; then
        log_info "Setup cancelled."
        exit 0
    fi

    # 3. Build command (optional)
    echo ""
    read -p "Build command? (press Enter to auto-detect) " -r BUILD_CMD
    if [[ "$BUILD_CMD" =~ ^(quit|exit|q)$ ]]; then
        log_info "Setup cancelled."
        exit 0
    fi

    # 4. Test command (optional)
    echo ""
    read -p "Test command? (press Enter to auto-detect) " -r TEST_CMD
    if [[ "$TEST_CMD" =~ ^(quit|exit|q)$ ]]; then
        log_info "Setup cancelled."
        exit 0
    fi

    echo ""
fi

# ─── Assemble prompt ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

SKILLS_FILE="/home/ralph/skills/ralph.md"
if [ ! -f "$SKILLS_FILE" ]; then
    log_error "Skills template not found at $SKILLS_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

# Read the ralph.md skill template
SKILL_TEMPLATE=$(cat "$SKILLS_FILE")

# Build the context block
if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
    # Detailed prompt mode — pass the full prompt as project context
    CONTEXT="The user has provided a detailed project prompt. Do NOT use AskUserQuestion — use the prompt below as the project description and goals.

DETAILED PROJECT PROMPT:
${PROMPT_TEXT}

TECH STACK: Auto-detect from the codebase. Examine existing files (package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, Cargo.toml, etc.) to determine the stack.
BUILD COMMAND: Auto-detect from the codebase.
TEST COMMAND: Auto-detect from the codebase."
else
    # Interactive mode — use interview answers
    CONTEXT="The user has already answered the interview questions. Do NOT use AskUserQuestion — use these answers directly:

PROJECT GOAL: ${PROJECT_GOAL}
"

    if [ -n "$TECH_STACK" ]; then
        CONTEXT+="TECH STACK: ${TECH_STACK}
"
    else
        CONTEXT+="TECH STACK: Auto-detect from the codebase. Examine existing files (package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, Cargo.toml, etc.) to determine the stack.
"
    fi

    if [ -n "$BUILD_CMD" ]; then
        CONTEXT+="BUILD COMMAND: ${BUILD_CMD}
"
    else
        CONTEXT+="BUILD COMMAND: Auto-detect from the codebase.
"
    fi

    if [ -n "$TEST_CMD" ]; then
        CONTEXT+="TEST COMMAND: ${TEST_CMD}
"
    else
        CONTEXT+="TEST COMMAND: Auto-detect from the codebase.
"
    fi
fi

CONTEXT+="
IMPORTANT OVERRIDES:
- Skip the Initial Assessment step (step 1) — the user has confirmed they want to set up.
- Skip ALL AskUserQuestion calls — all answers are provided above.
- Do NOT ask about creating an initial spec — skip step 9.
- Proceed directly through steps 2-8 using the answers above.
- For ralph.sh, use this exact RALPH_DOCKER line: RALPH_DOCKER=\"\${RALPH_DOCKER:-\$HOME/repos/claude/claudecode/ralph-docker}\"
- Make ralph.sh executable after creating it."

ASSEMBLED_PROMPT="${CONTEXT}

--- SKILL TEMPLATE (follow steps 2-8) ---

${SKILL_TEMPLATE}"

# ─── Generate files with Claude ──────────────────────────────────────

log_info "Generating project files with Claude ($MODEL)..."
echo ""

claude -p "$ASSEMBLED_PROMPT" \
    --dangerously-skip-permissions \
    --model "$MODEL" \
    --output-format text

CLAUDE_EXIT=$?

if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
    log_error "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
    exit 1
fi

# Make ralph.sh executable if it was created
[ -f "ralph.sh" ] && chmod +x ralph.sh

# ─── Summary ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo -e "  ${GREEN}Setup Complete${NC}"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
if [ -n "$PROMPT_TEXT" ]; then
    DISPLAY_GOAL="${PROMPT_TEXT:0:80}"
    [ ${#PROMPT_TEXT} -gt 80 ] && DISPLAY_GOAL+="..."
    echo "  Project Prompt: $DISPLAY_GOAL"
else
    echo "  Project Goal: $PROJECT_GOAL"
fi
echo ""
echo "  Created files:"
for f in AGENTS.md IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md PROMPT_plan.md PROMPT_build.md ralph.sh; do
    if [ -f "$f" ]; then
        echo -e "    ${GREEN}+${NC} $f"
    fi
done
if [ -d "specs" ]; then
    echo -e "    ${GREEN}+${NC} specs/"
fi
echo ""
echo "  Next steps:"
echo "    1. Add spec files to specs/ for each topic"
echo "    2. Run: ./ralph.sh plan    (analyze & plan)"
echo "    3. Review IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"
echo "    4. Run: ./ralph.sh         (build)"
echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

#!/bin/bash
# Test runner script for Ralph Docker tests

set -e

echo "Running Ralph Docker Tests..."
echo "============================="

# Check if tests directory exists
if [ ! -d "tests" ]; then
    echo "Error: tests directory not found"
    exit 1
fi

# Run output formatter tests
echo "Running output formatter tests..."
node tests/test_output_formatter.js

echo ""
echo "All tests completed successfully!"

file.content:
name: agentx

services:
  ralph:
    build:
      context: ${SCAFFOLD:?Set SCAFFOLD=/opt/agentx/scaffold}
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    env_file: ${WORKSPACE_PATH:-/opt/agentx}/secrets.env
    environment:
      WORKSPACE_PATH: /home/ralph/workspace
      RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS: ${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-5}
      RALPH_MODE: ${RALPH_MODE:-build}
      RALPH_MODEL: ${RALPH_MODEL:-claude-sonnet-4-6}
      RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT: ${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-pretty}
      RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING: "false"
      RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED: "true"
      RALPH_ENTIRE_STRATEGY: "manual-commit"
      RALPH_ENTIRE_PUSH_SESSIONS: "true"
      RALPH_ENTIRE_LOG_LEVEL: "warn"
      OLLAMA_HOST: http://localhost:11434
      GIT_SSH_COMMAND: ssh -i /home/ralph/.ssh/hostinger -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null
      GIT_CONFIG_COUNT: "1"
      GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0: safe.directory
      GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0: "*"
    volumes:
      - ${WORKSPACE_PATH:-/opt/agentx}:/home/ralph/workspace
      - ${SCAFFOLD}/lib:/home/ralph/workspace/lib:ro
      - ${WORKSPACE_PATH:-/opt/agentx}/.agent-claude:/home/ralph/.claude
      - ${WORKSPACE_PATH:-/opt/agentx}/.agent-ssh:/home/ralph/.ssh:ro  # must be chowned to uid 1001 (ralph)
    network_mode: host
    restart: "no"
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "10"

  # Phase 2: uncomment when Ollama is installed
  # litellm:
  #   build:
  #     context: ${SCAFFOLD}
  #     dockerfile: litellm.Dockerfile
  #   volumes:
  #     - ${SCAFFOLD}/litellm-config.yaml:/app/config.yaml:ro
  #   network_mode: host
  #   restart: unless-stopped

content.content:
1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Ralph Loop - Main loop script with output formatting
     3→# Runs inside the Docker container
     4→
     5→set -euo pipefail
     6→
     7→# Track start time for session duration
     8→SESSION_START=$(date +%s)
     9→
    10→# Colors
    11→RED='\033[0;31m'
    12→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    13→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    14→CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    15→NC='\033[0m'
    16→
    17→log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    18→log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    19→log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    20→log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    21→
    22→# Generate work summary
    23→generate_work_summary() {
    24→    local exit_reason="${1:-completed}"
    25→    local session_end=$(date +%s)
    26→    local duration=$((session_end - SESSION_START))
    27→    local duration_mins=$((duration / 60))
    28→    local duration_secs=$((duration % 60))
    29→
    30→    echo ""
    31→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    32→    if [ "$exit_reason" = "interrupted" ]; then
    33→        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Ralph Session Interrupted${NC}"
    34→    elif [ "$exit_reason" = "error" ]; then
    35→        echo -e "  ${RED}Ralph Session Ended (Error)${NC}"
    36→    else
    37→        echo -e "  ${GREEN}Ralph Session Complete${NC}"
    38→    fi
    39→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    40→    echo ""
    41→
    42→    # Session stats
    43→    echo "  Session Details:"
    44→    echo "    Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
    45→    echo "    Iterations: $ITERATION"
    46→    echo "    Duration: ${duration_mins}m ${duration_secs}s"
    47→    echo "    Mode: $MODE"
    48→    echo ""
    49→
    50→    # Git summary
    51→    local commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    52→    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    53→        echo "  Work Completed:"
    54→        echo "    Commits: $commit_count"
    55→
    56→        # Show files changed
    57→        local files_changed=$(git diff --name-only "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    58→        if [ "$files_changed" -gt 0 ]; then
    59→            echo "    Files modified: $files_changed"
    60→
    61→            # Show top 5 most changed files
    62→            echo ""
    63→            echo "    Key changes:"
    64→            git diff --stat "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -6 | tail -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    65→        fi
    66→
    67→        echo ""
    68→        echo "    Recent commits:"
    69→        git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    70→    else
    71→        echo "  No commits made during this session"
    72→    fi
    73→
    74→    # Implementation plan summary if exists
    75→    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
    76→        local completed_count=$(grep -c "^## Completed" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    77→        local current_count=$(grep -c "^## Current Focus" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    78→        if [ "$completed_count" -gt 0 ] || [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    79→            echo ""
    80→            echo "  Plan Status:"
    81→            echo "    See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for details"
    82→        fi
    83→    fi
    84→
    85→    # Next steps
    86→    echo ""
    87→    echo "  Next Steps:"
    88→    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    89→        echo "    1. Review changes: git diff ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}...${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    90→        echo "    2. Test the changes in your environment"
    91→        echo "    3. Create PR: gh pr create --base ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH} --head ${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    92→    else
    93→        echo "    1. Review any analysis or plans created"
    94→        echo "    2. Consider running: ./ralph.sh build"
    95→    fi
    96→
    97→    echo ""
    98→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    99→}
   100→
   101→# Open a PR and immediately merge it into the base branch
   102→auto_merge_pr() {
   103→    local commit_count
   104→    commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   105→    if [ "$commit_count" -eq 0 ]; then
   106→        log_info "No commits on $RALPH_BRANCH — skipping PR"
   107→        return 0
   108→    fi
   109→
   110→    command -v gh &>/dev/null || { log_warn "gh CLI not found — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
   111→    [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || { log_warn "GITHUB_TOKEN not set — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
   112→
   113→    local title
   114→    title="ralph: $(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)"
   115→    local body
   116→    body="$(printf 'Auto-merged by Ralph (%d iteration(s))\n\n' "$ITERATION")$(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH")"
   117→
   118→    log_info "Creating PR: $RALPH_BRANCH -> $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   119→    local pr_url
   120→    if pr_url=$(gh pr create --base "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --head "$RALPH_BRANCH" --title "$title" --body "$body" 2>&1); then
   121→        log_success "PR created: $pr_url"
   122→        if gh pr merge "$pr_url" --merge --delete-branch 2>&1; then
   123→            log_success "PR merged into $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   124→        else
   125→            log_warn "Auto-merge failed — review manually: $pr_url"
   126→        fi
   127→    else
   128→        log_warn "PR creation failed: $pr_url"
   129→    fi
   130→}
   131→
   132→# Cleanup scaffolding files
   133→cleanup_scaffolding() {
   134→    log_info "Cleaning up Ralph scaffolding files..."
   135→
   136→    local files_to_remove=()
   137→    local dirs_to_remove=()
   138→
   139→    # Check which scaffolding files exist
   140→    [ -d "specs" ] && dirs_to_remove+=("specs")
   141→    [ -f "AGENTS.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("AGENTS.md")
   142→    [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md")
   143→    [ -f "PROMPT_plan.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan.md")
   144→    [ -f "PROMPT_build.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build.md")
   145→    [ -f "PROMPT_plan_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan_local.md")
   146→    [ -f "PROMPT_build_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build_local.md")
   147→
   148→    if [ ${#files_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ] && [ ${#dirs_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
   149→        log_info "No scaffolding files to clean up"
   150→        return
   151→    fi
   152→
   153→    # Remove the files
   154→    for file in "${files_to_remove[@]}"; do
   155→        git rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || rm -f "$file"
   156→        log_info "  Removed: $file"
   157→    done
   158→
   159→    for dir in "${dirs_to_remove[@]}"; do
   160→        git rm -rf "$dir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$dir"
   161→        log_info "  Removed: $dir/"
   162→    done
   163→
   164→    # Create cleanup commit if there are changes
   165→    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
   166→        log_info "Creating cleanup commit..."
   167→        git commit -m "chore: Remove Ralph scaffolding files
   168→
   169→These files were used during the Ralph development session
   170→and are no longer needed for the final pull request."
   171→
   172→        # Push if enabled
   173→        if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
   174→            log_info "Pushing cleanup commit..."
   175→            git push origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
   176→                git push -u origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
   177→                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
   178→        fi
   179→    fi
   180→}
   181→
   182→# Handle interruption gracefully
   183→handle_interruption() {
   184→    echo ""
   185→    log_warn "Ralph loop interrupted by user (Ctrl+C)"
   186→    generate_work_summary "interrupted"
   187→    /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "interrupted" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
   188→    exit 130
   189→}
   190→
   191→# Set up signal trap for graceful interruption
   192→trap 'handle_interruption' INT TERM
   193→
   194→# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
   195→entire_available() {
   196→    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
   197→}
   198→
   199→# Change to workspace directory
   200→cd "${RALPH_WORKSPACE:-/home/ralph/workspace}"
   201→
   202→# Configuration from environment
   203→MODE="${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
   204→MAX_ITERATIONS="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0}"
   205→MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
   206→OUTPUT_FORMAT="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-plain}"
   207→PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"
   208→
   209→# Determine prompt file
   210→case "$MODE" in
   211→    plan)
   212→        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_plan.md"
   213→        ;;
   214→    build|*)
   215→        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_build.md"
   216→        ;;
   217→esac
   218→
   219→# Check if using local model (Ollama) - prefer _local variants
   220→IS_LOCAL_MODEL=false
   221→if [[ "$MODEL" == ollama/* ]] || [[ -n "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" && "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" != *"anthropic.com"* ]]; then
   222→    IS_LOCAL_MODEL=true
   223→fi
   224→
   225→# Check for project-specific prompts (prefer _local for local models)
   226→if [ "$IS_LOCAL_MODEL" = true ] && [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md" ]; then
   227→    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md"
   228→    log_info "Using local model prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   229→elif [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}.md" ]; then
   230→    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}.md"
   231→    log_info "Using project prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   232→fi
   233→
   234→# Verify prompt exists
   235→if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
   236→    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
   237→    exit 1
   238→fi
   239→
   240→# Read prompt content now (before any git operations that might stash/remove files)
   241→PROMPT_CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")
   242→
   243→# Build model argument
   244→MODEL_ARG="--model $MODEL"
   245→
   246→# Iteration counter
   247→ITERATION=0
   248→
   249→# Verify we're in a git repo
   250→if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
   251→    log_error "Not a git repository!"
   252→    log_error "Initialize with: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
   253→    exit 1
   254→fi
   255→
   256→# Get the workspace name from directory
   257→WORKSPACE_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")
   258→
   259→# Create a new branch for this Ralph session
   260→TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
   261→RALPH_BRANCH="ralph/${WORKSPACE_NAME}-${TIMESTAMP}"
   262→ORIGINAL_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")
   263→
   264→# Guard: if we're on a stale ralph branch, switch to main before proceeding
   265→if [[ "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" == ralph/* ]]; then
   266→    log_warn "Currently on stale ralph branch: $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   267→    log_info "Switching to main before starting new session..."
   268→    DEFAULT_BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
   269→    if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
   270→        log_warn "Committing uncommitted changes before switching branches..."
   271→        git add -A && git commit -m "wip: uncommitted changes from previous session" 2>/dev/null || true
   272→        git push origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
   273→    fi
   274→    if git checkout "$DEFAULT_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
   275→        ORIGINAL_BRANCH="$DEFAULT_BRANCH"
   276→        log_info "Switched to $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   277→    else
   278→        log_error "Failed to switch to $DEFAULT_BRANCH — run: git checkout main && git pull"
   279→        exit 1
   280→    fi
   281→fi
   282→
   283→# Warn if main is behind origin so we don't silently work on stale code
   284→if git fetch origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --dry-run 2>/dev/null; then
   285→    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
   286→    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse "origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true)
   287→    if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then
   288→        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   289→        if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then
   290→            log_warn "Branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH — consider running: git pull"
   291→        fi
   292→    fi
   293→fi
   294→
   295→# Check for uncommitted changes
   296→DID_STASH=false
   297→if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then
   298→    log_warn "Uncommitted changes detected"
   299→    log_info "Stashing changes before creating branch..."
   300→    git stash push -m "Ralph auto-stash before $RALPH_BRANCH"
   301→    DID_STASH=true
   302→fi
   303→
   304→# Create and checkout the new branch
   305→log_info "Creating branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
   306→if ! git checkout -b "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
   307→    log_error "Failed to create branch $RALPH_BRANCH"
   308→    exit 1
   309→fi
   310→
   311→# Restore stashed changes onto the new branch so scaffolding files are available
   312→if [ "$DID_STASH" = true ]; then
   313→    log_info "Restoring stashed changes onto $RALPH_BRANCH..."
   314→    git stash pop 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Stash pop failed (changes may conflict)"
   315→fi
   316→
   317→log_info "Starting loop..."
   318→log_info "Prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   319→log_info "Model: $MODEL"
   320→log_info "Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH (from $ORIGINAL_BRANCH)"
   321→log_info "Working dir: $(pwd)"
   322→
   323→# Check for IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
   324→if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
   325→    log_info "Found IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md - will continue from existing progress"
   326→else
   327→    log_warn "No IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md found - Ralph will create one"
   328→fi
   329→echo ""
   330→
   331→# Temp file for capturing output
   332→OUTPUT_TMP=$(mktemp)
   333→trap 'rm -f "$OUTPUT_TMP"' EXIT
   334→
   335→# Output formatting command
   336→format_output() {
   337→    if [ "$OUTPUT_FORMAT" = "pretty" ]; then
   338→        /home/ralph/scripts/format-output.sh
   339→    else
   340→        cat
   341→    fi
   342→}
   343→
   344→# Check for critical errors in output
   345→# Only check the result JSON line, not the full conversation
   346→check_for_errors() {
   347→    local output_file="$1"
   348→
   349→    # Extract just the final result line (contains "type":"result")
   350→    local result_line
   351→    result_line=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
   352→
   353→    # If no result line, check for startup errors in full output
   354→    if [[ -z "$result_line" ]]; then
   355→        # Check for model not found during startup (LiteLLM specific error)
   356→        if grep -q "OllamaException.*not found\|litellm.*model.*not found" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   357→            log_error "Model not found: $MODEL"
   358→            echo ""
   359→            log_error "Available models - check litellm-config.yaml or run: ollama list"
   360→            return 1
   361→        fi
   362→
   363→        # Check for connection errors
   364→        if grep -q "APIConnectionError\|Connection refused\|ECONNREFUSED" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   365→            log_error "Connection error - is Ollama running?"
   366→            return 1
   367→        fi
   368→    fi
   369→
   370→    # Check result line for errors
   371→    if [[ -n "$result_line" ]]; then
   372→        if echo "$result_line" | grep -q '"is_error":true'; then
   373→            # Extract error message if present
   374→            local errors
   375→            errors=$(echo "$result_line" | grep -o '"errors":\[[^]]*\]' | head -1)
   376→            if [[ -n "$errors" ]]; then
   377→                log_warn "Session completed with errors"
   378→                # Don't fail - Ralph might have partially succeeded
   379→            fi
   380→        fi
   381→    fi
   382→
   383→    return 0
   384→}
   385→
   386→# Main loop
   387→log_info "Max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS (ITERATION starts at $ITERATION)"
   388→while true; do
   389→    # Check iteration limit
   390→    if [ "$MAX_ITERATIONS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ITERATION" -ge "$MAX_ITERATIONS" ]; then
   391→        echo ""
   392→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   393→        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
   394→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   395→        break
   396→    fi
   397→
   398→    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
   399→    echo ""
   400→    echo "┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐"
   401→    echo "│  ITERATION $ITERATION                                  │"
   402→    echo "└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘"
   403→    echo ""
   404→
   405→    # Run Claude with the prompt, capture output for error checking
   406→    # -p: Headless mode (non-interactive)
   407→    # --dangerously-skip-permissions: Auto-approve tool calls
   408→    # --output-format=stream-json: Structured output for filtering
   409→    echo "$PROMPT_CONTENT" | claude -p \
   410→        --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   411→        --output-format=stream-json \
   412→        $MODEL_ARG \
   413→        --verbose 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_TMP" | format_output
   414→
   415→    CLAUDE_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   416→
   417→    # Check for critical errors
   418→    if ! check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_TMP"; then
   419→        log_error "Critical error detected, stopping loop"
   420→        echo ""
   421→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   422→        echo "  Raw error output:"
   423→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   424→        # Show last 50 lines of raw output for debugging
   425→        tail -50 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
   426→        generate_work_summary "error"
   427→        exit 1
   428→    fi
   429→
   430→    if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
   431→        log_warn "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
   432→        # Show some context on non-zero exit
   433→        echo "Last output:"
   434→        tail -20 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
   435→    fi
   436→
   437→    # Push changes if configured
   438→    if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
   439→        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   440→        if [ -n "$CURRENT_BRANCH" ]; then
   441→            log_info "Pushing to origin/$CURRENT_BRANCH..."
   442→            push_output=""
   443→            if push_output=$(git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
   444→                log_success "Push successful"
   445→            elif push_output=$(git push -u origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
   446→                log_success "Push successful (set upstream)"
   447→            else
   448→                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
   449→                # Check for common SSH issues
   450→                if echo "$push_output" | grep -q "authenticity of host\|Host key verification"; then
   451→                    log_warn "SSH host key not trusted. Run on host machine:"
   452→                    log_warn "  ssh-keyscan <git-host> >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts"
   453→                elif echo "$push_output" | grep -q "Permission denied\|publickey"; then
   454→                    log_warn "SSH key issue. Ensure ~/.ssh is mounted and keys have correct permissions"
   455→                else
   456→                    echo "$push_output" | head -5
   457→                fi
   458→            fi
   459→        fi
   460→    else
   461→        log_info "Push disabled (RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=false)"
   462→    fi
   463→
   464→    echo ""
   465→    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
   466→    log_success "ITERATION $ITERATION COMPLETE"
   467→    if entire_available; then
   468→        checkpoint_info=$(entire status --short 2>/dev/null) && \
   469→            log_info "Entire: $checkpoint_info" || true
   470→    fi
   471→    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
   472→    echo ""
   473→
   474→    # Check if all tasks in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md are complete
   475→    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
   476→        pending_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[ \]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   477→        completed_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[x\]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   478→        if [ "$pending_tasks" -eq 0 ] && [ "$completed_tasks" -gt 0 ]; then
   479→            echo ""
   480→            log_success "All tasks complete ($completed_tasks done, 0 pending) — stopping early"
   481→            break
   482→        else
   483→            log_info "Plan status: $completed_tasks done, $pending_tasks pending"
   484→        fi
   485→    fi
   486→
   487→    # Small delay between iterations
   488→    sleep 1
   489→done
   490→
   491→# Generate work summary
   492→generate_work_summary "completed"
   493→
   494→# Clean up scaffolding files if configured
   495→if [ "${RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING:-true}" = "true" ]; then
   496→    cleanup_scaffolding
   497→else
   498→    log_info "Scaffolding cleanup disabled (RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING=false)"
   499→fi
   500→
   501→auto_merge_pr
   502→
   503→/home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "completed" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
   504→
   505→echo ""
   506→log_success "Loop finished after $ITERATION iterations"
   507→

#!/bin/bash
# Ralph Loop - Main loop script with output formatting
# Runs inside the Docker container

set -euo pipefail

# Track start time for session duration
SESSION_START=$(date +%s)

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary() {
    local exit_reason="${1:-completed}"
    local session_end=$(date +%s)
    local duration=$((session_end - SESSION_START))
    local duration_mins=$((duration / 60))
    local duration_secs=$((duration % 60))

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    if [ "$exit_reason" = "interrupted" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Ralph Session Interrupted${NC}"
    elif [ "$exit_reason" = "error" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}Ralph Session Ended (Error)${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}Ralph Session Complete${NC}"
    fi
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo ""

    # Session stats
    echo "  Session Details:"
    echo "    Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
    echo "    Iterations: $ITERATION"
    echo "    Duration: ${duration_mins}m ${duration_secs}s"
    echo "    Mode: $MODE"
    echo ""

    # Git summary
    local commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "  Work Completed:"
        echo "    Commits: $commit_count"

        # Show files changed
        local files_changed=$(git diff --name-only "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$files_changed" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "    Files modified: $files_changed"

            # Show top 5 most changed files
            echo ""
            echo "    Key changes:"
            git diff --stat "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -6 | tail -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
        fi

        echo ""
        echo "    Recent commits:"
        git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    else
        echo "  No commits made during this session"
    fi

    # Implementation plan summary if exists
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        local completed_count=$(grep -c "^## Completed" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        local current_count=$(grep -c "^## Current Focus" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$completed_count" -gt 0 ] || [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            echo "  Plan Status:"
            echo "    See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for details"
        fi
    fi

    # Next steps
    echo ""
    echo "  Next Steps:"
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "    1. Review changes: git diff ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}...${RALPH_BRANCH}"
        echo "    2. Test the changes in your environment"
        echo "    3. Create PR: gh pr create --base ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH} --head ${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    else
        echo "    1. Review any analysis or plans created"
        echo "    2. Consider running: ./ralph.sh build"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
}

# Open a PR and immediately merge it into the base branch
auto_merge_pr() {
    local commit_count
    commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No commits on $RALPH_BRANCH — skipping PR"
        return 0
    fi

    command -v gh &>/dev/null || { log_warn "gh CLI not found — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
    [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || { log_warn "GITHUB_TOKEN not set — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }

    local title
    title="ralph: $(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)"
    local body
    body="$(printf 'Auto-merged by Ralph (%d iteration(s))\n\n' "$ITERATION")$(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH")"

    log_info "Creating PR: $RALPH_BRANCH -> $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    local pr_url
    if pr_url=$(gh pr create --base "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --head "$RALPH_BRANCH" --title "$title" --body "$body" 2>&1); then
        log_success "PR created: $pr_url"
        if gh pr merge "$pr_url" --merge --delete-branch 2>&1; then
            log_success "PR merged into $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
        else
            log_warn "Auto-merge failed — review manually: $pr_url"
        fi
    else
        log_warn "PR creation failed: $pr_url"
    fi
}

# Cleanup scaffolding files
cleanup_scaffolding() {
    log_info "Cleaning up Ralph scaffolding files..."

    local files_to_remove=()
    local dirs_to_remove=()

    # Check which scaffolding files exist
    [ -d "specs" ] && dirs_to_remove+=("specs")
    [ -f "AGENTS.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("AGENTS.md")
    [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan_local.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build_local.md")

    if [ ${#files_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ] && [ ${#dirs_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No scaffolding files to clean up"
        return
    fi

    # Remove the files
    for file in "${files_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || rm -f "$file"
        log_info "  Removed: $file"
    done

    for dir in "${dirs_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -rf "$dir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$dir"
        log_info "  Removed: $dir/"
    done

    # Create cleanup commit if there are changes
    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_info "Creating cleanup commit..."
        git commit -m "chore: Remove Ralph scaffolding files

These files were used during the Ralph development session
and are no longer needed for the final pull request."

        # Push if enabled
        if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing cleanup commit..."
            git push origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                git push -u origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
        fi
    fi
}

# Handle interruption gracefully
handle_interruption() {
    echo ""
    log_warn "Ralph loop interrupted by user (Ctrl+C)"
    generate_work_summary "interrupted"
    /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "interrupted" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
    exit 130
}

# Set up signal trap for graceful interruption
trap 'handle_interruption' INT TERM

# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
entire_available() {
    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
}

# Change to workspace directory
cd "${RALPH_WORKSPACE:-/home/ralph/workspace}"

# Configuration from environment
MODE="${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
MAX_ITERATIONS="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0}"
MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
OUTPUT_FORMAT="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-plain}"
PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"

# Determine prompt file
case "$MODE" in
    plan)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_plan.md"
        ;;
    build|*)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_build.md"
        ;;
esac

# Check if using local model (Ollama) - prefer _local variants
IS_LOCAL_MODEL=false
if [[ "$MODEL" == ollama/* ]] || [[ -n "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" && "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" != *"anthropic.com"* ]]; then
    IS_LOCAL_MODEL=true
fi

# Check for project-specific prompts (prefer _local for local models)
if [ "$IS_LOCAL_MODEL" = true ] && [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md"
    log_info "Using local model prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
elif [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}.md"
    log_info "Using project prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
fi

# Verify prompt exists
if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

# Read prompt content now (before any git operations that might stash/remove files)
PROMPT_CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")

# Build model argument
MODEL_ARG="--model $MODEL"

# Iteration counter
ITERATION=0

# Verify we're in a git repo
if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Not a git repository!"
    log_error "Initialize with: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
    exit 1
fi

# Get the workspace name from directory
WORKSPACE_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")

# Create a new branch for this Ralph session
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
RALPH_BRANCH="ralph/${WORKSPACE_NAME}-${TIMESTAMP}"
ORIGINAL_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")

# Guard: if we're on a stale ralph branch, switch to main before proceeding
if [[ "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" == ralph/* ]]; then
    log_warn "Currently on stale ralph branch: $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    log_info "Switching to main before starting new session..."
    DEFAULT_BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
    if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_warn "Committing uncommitted changes before switching branches..."
        git add -A && git commit -m "wip: uncommitted changes from previous session" 2>/dev/null || true
        git push origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    if git checkout "$DEFAULT_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
        ORIGINAL_BRANCH="$DEFAULT_BRANCH"
        log_info "Switched to $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    else
        log_error "Failed to switch to $DEFAULT_BRANCH — run: git checkout main && git pull"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

# Warn if main is behind origin so we don't silently work on stale code
if git fetch origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --dry-run 2>/dev/null; then
    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse "origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then
        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then
            log_warn "Branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH — consider running: git pull"
        fi
    fi
fi

# Check for uncommitted changes
DID_STASH=false
if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then
    log_warn "Uncommitted changes detected"
    log_info "Stashing changes before creating branch..."
    git stash push -m "Ralph auto-stash before $RALPH_BRANCH"
    DID_STASH=true
fi

# Create and checkout the new branch
log_info "Creating branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
if ! git checkout -b "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Failed to create branch $RALPH_BRANCH"
    exit 1
fi

# Restore stashed changes onto the new branch so scaffolding files are available
if [ "$DID_STASH" = true ]; then
    log_info "Restoring stashed changes onto $RALPH_BRANCH..."
    git stash pop 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Stash pop failed (changes may conflict)"
fi

log_info "Starting loop..."
log_info "Prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
log_info "Model: $MODEL"
log_info "Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH (from $ORIGINAL_BRANCH)"
log_info "Working dir: $(pwd)"

# Check for IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
    log_info "Found IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md - will continue from existing progress"
else
    log_warn "No IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md found - Ralph will create one"
fi
echo ""

# Temp file for capturing output
OUTPUT_TMP=$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "$OUTPUT_TMP"' EXIT

# Output formatting command
format_output() {
    if [ "$OUTPUT_FORMAT" = "pretty" ]; then
        /home/ralph/scripts/format-output.sh
    else
        cat
    fi
}

# Check for critical errors in output
# Only check the result JSON line, not the full conversation
check_for_errors() {
    local output_file="$1"

    # Extract just the final result line (contains "type":"result")
    local result_line
    result_line=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)

    # If no result line, check for startup errors in full output
    if [[ -z "$result_line" ]]; then
        # Check for model not found during startup (LiteLLM specific error)
        if grep -q "OllamaException.*not found\|litellm.*model.*not found" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Model not found: $MODEL"
            echo ""
            log_error "Available models - check litellm-config.yaml or run: ollama list"
            return 1
        fi

        # Check for connection errors
        if grep -q "APIConnectionError\|Connection refused\|ECONNREFUSED" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Connection error - is Ollama running?"
            return 1
        fi
    fi

    # Check result line for errors
    if [[ -n "$result_line" ]]; then
        if echo "$result_line" | grep -q '"is_error":true'; then
            # Extract error message if present
            local errors
            errors=$(echo "$result_line" | grep -o '"errors":\[[^]]*\]' | head -1)
            if [[ -n "$errors" ]]; then
                log_warn "Session completed with errors"
                # Don't fail - Ralph might have partially succeeded
            fi
        fi
    fi

    return 0
}

# Main loop
log_info "Max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS (ITERATION starts at $ITERATION)"
while true; do
    # Check iteration limit
    if [ "$MAX_ITERATIONS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ITERATION" -ge "$MAX_ITERATIONS" ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        break
    fi

    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
    echo ""
    echo "┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐"
    echo "│  ITERATION $ITERATION                                  │"
    echo "└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘"
    echo ""

    # Run Claude with the prompt, capture output for error checking
    # -p: Headless mode (non-interactive)
    # --dangerously-skip-permissions: Auto-approve tool calls
    # --output-format=stream-json: Structured output for filtering
    echo "$PROMPT_CONTENT" | claude -p \
        --dangerously-skip-permissions \
        --output-format=stream-json \
        $MODEL_ARG \
        --verbose 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_TMP" | format_output

    CLAUDE_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

    # Check for critical errors
    if ! check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_TMP"; then
        log_error "Critical error detected, stopping loop"
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        echo "  Raw error output:"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        # Show last 50 lines of raw output for debugging
        tail -50 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
        generate_work_summary "error"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
        log_warn "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
        # Show some context on non-zero exit
        echo "Last output:"
        tail -20 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
    fi

    # Push changes if configured
    if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
        if [ -n "$CURRENT_BRANCH" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing to origin/$CURRENT_BRANCH..."
            push_output=""
            if push_output=$(git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful"
            elif push_output=$(git push -u origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful (set upstream)"
            else
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
                # Check for common SSH issues
                if echo "$push_output" | grep -q "authenticity of host\|Host key verification"; then
                    log_warn "SSH host key not trusted. Run on host machine:"
                    log_warn "  ssh-keyscan <git-host> >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts"
                elif echo "$push_output" | grep -q "Permission denied\|publickey"; then
                    log_warn "SSH key issue. Ensure ~/.ssh is mounted and keys have correct permissions"
                else
                    echo "$push_output" | head -5
                fi
            fi
        fi
    else
        log_info "Push disabled (RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=false)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    log_success "ITERATION $ITERATION COMPLETE"
    if entire_available; then
        checkpoint_info=$(entire status --short 2>/dev/null) && \
            log_info "Entire: $checkpoint_info" || true
    fi
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    echo ""

    # Check if all tasks in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md are complete
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        pending_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[ \]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        completed_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[x\]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$pending_tasks" -eq 0 ] && [ "$completed_tasks" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            log_success "All tasks complete ($completed_tasks done, 0 pending) — stopping early"
            break
        else
            log_info "Plan status: $completed_tasks done, $pending_tasks pending"
        fi
    fi

    # Small delay between iterations
    sleep 1
done

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary "completed"

# Clean up scaffolding files if configured
if [ "${RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING:-true}" = "true" ]; then
    cleanup_scaffolding
else
    log_info "Scaffolding cleanup disabled (RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING=false)"
fi

auto_merge_pr

/home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "completed" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"

echo ""
log_success "Loop finished after $ITERATION iterations"

FROM node:22.13-slim

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    jq \
    ripgrep \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install GitHub CLI (gh) for auto-merge PRs
RUN arch=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/latest/download/gh_$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/cli/cli/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | sed 's/v//')_linux_${arch}.tar.gz" \
        | tar -xz --wildcards --strip-components=2 -C /usr/local/bin '*/bin/gh' \
    && echo "gh installed: $(gh --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo ok)" \
    || echo "WARNING: gh CLI install skipped — auto-merge disabled"

# Install Entire CLI for AI session observability (optional, non-blocking)
RUN arch=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/entireio/cli/releases/latest/download/entire_linux_${arch}.tar.gz" \
        | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin entire \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entire \
    && echo "Entire installed: $(entire --version 2>/dev/null || echo ok)" \
    || echo "WARNING: Entire CLI install skipped — observability disabled"

# Install Claude Code CLI (pin to major version for stability)
RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@1

# Create non-root user for security
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash ralph
USER ralph
WORKDIR /home/ralph

# Create directory structure with required subdirectories
RUN mkdir -p .claude/debug .claude/todos .claude/statsig workspace prompts && \
    echo '{}' > .claude/remote-settings.json

# Copy scripts and libraries
COPY --chown=ralph:ralph scripts/ scripts/
COPY --chown=ralph:ralph lib/ lib/
COPY --chown=ralph:ralph prompts/ prompts/
COPY --chown=ralph:ralph skills/ skills/

# Make scripts executable
RUN chmod +x scripts/*.sh

# Environment configuration
ENV RALPH_MODE=build \
    RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS=5 \
    RALPH_MODEL=opus \
    RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT=plain \
    RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=true

# Working directory for mounted projects
WORKDIR /home/ralph/workspace

ENTRYPOINT ["/home/ralph/scripts/entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["loop"]

Now I have a complete picture. The Dockerfile:
1. Copies `scaffold/lib/` to `/home/ralph/lib/` (inside container)
2. Copies `scaffold/scripts/` to `/home/ralph/scripts/`
3. Copies `scaffold/prompts/` to `/home/ralph/prompts/`

But then vps-compose.yml mounts:
- `${SCAFFOLD}/lib:/home/ralph/workspace/lib:ro` - this mounts scaffold/lib to workspace/lib (inside container: /home/ralph/workspace/lib)

So `scaffold/lib/` is available in two places inside the container:


1. `/home/ralph/lib/` (copied at build time by Dockerfile)
2. `/home/ralph/workspace/lib/` (mounted at runtime by vps-compose)
